record.field: HouseKeeping: Set task ready if no approvers required after cleaning
HouseKeeping: Has right to approve tasks

project = env['project.project'].search([('x_is_house_keeping_project', '=', True)], limit=1) newtasks = [] for slot in env['planning.slot'].search([('start_datetime','<',datetime.datetime.now()),('end_datetime','>',datetime.datetime.now())]): if any(slot.resource_id.role_ids.mapped('x_is_room_offer')): cleaning_state = '' if slot.end_datetime < datetime.datetime.now() + datetime.timedelta(hours=24): slot.resource_id['x_occupancy'] = 'due_out' cleaning_state = 'checkout' else: slot.resource_id['x_occupancy'] = 'stayover' cleaning_state = 'stayover' newtasks.append({ 'name': "HK " + slot.resource_id.name, 'project_id': project.id, 'partner_id': slot.sale_line_id.order_id.partner_id.id, 'description': "Automatically generated house keeping task.", 'date_deadline': (datetime.datetime.now() + datetime.timedelta(hours=24)), 'x_resource': slot.resource_id.id, 'x_cleaning': cleaning_state, }) env['project.task'].create(newtasks)
